'''Asth-korr''' was a type of [[Throat/Legends|throat]]-hold move sometimes utilized by [[Warrior caste|warriors]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Species/Legends|species]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], in which the [[Extragalactic/Legends|extra-galactic]] species invaded another [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]].<ref name="Force" /> Created by [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]],<ref name="ERC" /> the asth-korr throat-hold involved vising ones' [[Limb/Legends|hands]] around an opponent's neck.<ref name="Force" /> The throat-hold was one of the many [[Unarmed combat/Legends|unarmed combat]] moves that [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Tahiri Veila]] knew, as [[Gender/Legends|she]] had been partially [[Shaping protocol|shaped]] by the Yuuzhan Vong in an attempt by their [[Shaper caste|shapers]] to convert her to the Yuuzhan Vong religion of the [[True Way]].<ref name="Heretic" /> In [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]], during the war, a [[Unidentified Yuuzhan Vong warrior (Caluula Station)|warrior]] used the move on former [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] while on the [[Space station/Legends|space platform]] [[Caluula Station]], at the [[Time/Legends|time]] of a [[Battle of Caluula|battle]] between the Yuuzhan Vong and the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] at the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Caluula/Legends|Caluula]].<ref name="Force" />

==Behind the scenes==
The asth-korr attack first appeared in [[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic III: Reunion|''Force Heretic III: Reunion'']], a [[2003]] [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|''New Jedi Order'']] installment written by [[Shane Dix]] and [[Sean Williams]]. 2003's [[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force|''The Unifying Force'']], which was written by [[James Luceno]] as a part of the series, featured the throat-hold as well.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic III: Reunion]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''
